mechanism_summary: AFLFast FAST power schedule multiplies mutation budget up to 4x for rarely-hit coverage buckets, giving seeds that partially satisfy the Host-header pointer check more havoc mutations to complete it; minimizer lacks this rarity weighting.
one_line: FAST schedule boosts havoc budget on rare Host-header seeds

mechanism_summary: AFLFast FAST rare-edge power schedule concentrates havoc budget on the rarely-exercised cookie-path seed, resolving the non-null pointer check; minimizer's calibration-only energy provides no rarity-weighted boost.
one_line: FAST rarity schedule amplifies havoc on rare cookie-path seeds
